meaning: adj.生锈的,迟钝的,腐蚀了的,铁锈色的,生了锈的
examples: The bike is rusty but usable.
The box was fastened with a rusty wire.
A thin curl of smoke rose from a rusty stove.
Instead, Stoudemire looked rusty, scoring seven points and grabbing just two rebounds in nine minutes.
As it is for many people, your friendship-building skills may be a little rusty.
